title: Bank of England Eases Stablecoin Rules, Swaps Holding Caps for £40B ‘Guardrail’
snippet: The BoE scrapped individual holding caps for a £40 billion per-coin issuance limit and will let issuers hold more reserves in government debt.

title: StanChart backed Libeara raises $14m from GSR, Kyobo Life, others for tokenization

title: Blockchain platform Allium raises $40 million Series B
snippet: Allium, the leading blockchain data platform for enterprises, today announced it has raised $40 million in Series B funding led by Amplify Partners, with participation from existing investors Kleiner Perkins and Theory Ventures. Amplify’s David Beyer will join the Board as part of the investment.

title: Former BIS chief softens stance on stablecoins, backs coexistence with fiat

title: US Senate passes housing supply bill featuring CBDC ban in 85-5 vote
snippet: The housing supply bill seeks to ban the issuance of a CBDC or any similar digital asset until the end of 2030.
